subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the Call from the Kingdom of Names, from thy Lord, the Creator of heaven. Verily, there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد ان استمع الندآء من ملکوت الاسماء شطر ربک فاطر السماء انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
